Alan Le recalled day-long fishing trips with dad and how much there is to miss about those bonding experiences now that the dad has passed away. But Darnell Branch that because their father left the family decades ago, those same bonding experiences ended up being with a neighbor, who would also organize fishing trips sometimes.
